calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing And Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Feb-19-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bruno Peguese, Esq, Appearing on behalf of Plaintiffs Glen & Barbara Portert;
Barbara Baumgartner, Deputy City Attorney, Appearing for Defendant San Francisco Animal Care Control;

Ruling - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONERS GLEN PORTER, BARBARA ALLEN'S Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is taken under submission.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HEK)

Notice Of Hearing And Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Continued To Feb-14-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
*The Law & Motion calendar for February 6, 2019 is heard by Judge Harold E. Kahn due to the unavailability of Judge Ethan P. Schulman.*

No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER GLEN PORTER, BARBARA ALLEN's Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Administrative Mandamus.

Continued to February 14, 9:30 am, Dept. 302.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
